title: Import into connected board columns
excerpt: I would like to be able to import data into board columns that are linked to a connected board.  It is a major pain to have manually set these values when I have a large recordset to import.  I have seen the suggested wo…

posts.author: shaun.mclean (Shaun McLean)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to be able to import data into board columns that are linked to a connected board. It is a major pain to have manually set these values when I have a large recordset to import. I have seen the suggested workaround to import into a text column and use an automation to set the connect board value. This will work but really the feature to support importing into connected board columns should be available.

posts.author: shaun.mclean (Shaun McLean)
posts.cookedHtml:
Title should read ‘Import into connected board columns’

Would be good to be able to edit your own posts.
